title: monopsis debilis var. depressa
intro: Monopsis debilis var. depressa, also known as weak or weak-depressed monopsis, is a plant species in the bellflower family, Campanulaceae. This plant is reported to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat fever, cough, and sore throat due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Monopsis debilis var. depressa include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by drying the leaves to make a powdered extract that can be used in various remedies.
